item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 immediately brakes the fourth local patch and reframes the pattern as repeated local repair/patch-wall behavior, while allowing only a bounded emergency.
